definitions: Alex SyCip is a Filipino-American entrepreneur and co-founder of the popular dessert shop 'Magnolia Bakery' in New York City.
He is also known for his involvement in various other culinary ventures and his contributions to the food industry.
examples: Alex SyCip's vision helped establish Magnolia Bakery as a beloved institution.
Many admire Alex SyCip's entrepreneurial spirit.
The new restaurant project is rumored to involve Alex SyCip.
